finalized_plan.description: Use the file inspection tool to load and transcribe the audio file located at "data/gaia/validation/2b3ef98c-cc05-450b-a719-711aee40ac65.mp3" to obtain the professor's original spoken line
Verify the transcription carefully to ensure it exactly reproduces the professor’s words, checking for any punctuation or deviations
Remove any punctuation from the transcribed line to create a clean version suitable for anagram generation
Generate an anagram from the clean transcribed text by rearranging all letters exactly once, ensuring that every letter from the original transcription is used exactly once in the rearranged order
Verify that the anagram is correct by comparing the letter frequency of the anagram with that of the cleaned transcription to confirm all letters match exactly

Use the final_answer tool to return a structured answer containing:  
  • A short version of the task outcome (the anagram text only, with no punctuation).  
  • An extremely detailed version explaining each verification and transformation step.  
  • Additional context describing any assumptions or methods used

root_cause_reasoning: The agent faild to convert the MP3 file to markdown
